# Reproducibility {#sec-reproducibility}

## Code Repository

All data preparation and analysis scripts are available in the IMPT-data GitHub repository:

> `https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data`

Scripts are organised with a numeric prefix indicating execution order:

| Prefix | Phase | Script(s) |
|--------|-------|-----------|
| 00 | Setup | [`00a_impt_data_handle.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/00a_impt_data_handle.R), [`00b_data_load.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/00b_data_load.R) |
| 01 | Geometry & base data preparation | [`01_data_prep.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/01_data_prep.R) |
| 02 | Socio-demographics & land use | [`02_*.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/tree/main/code/) (5 scripts) |
| 03 | Routing & travel time matrices | [`03_ttm_gridh3.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/03_ttm_gridh3.R) |
| 04 | Dimension calculations | [`04_*.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/tree/main/code/) (10 scripts) |
| 05 | Index computation | [`05_IMPTcalculator.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/05_IMPTcalculator.R), [`05a_results_export_pca.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/05a_results_export_pca.R) |
| 06 | Output & dashboard | [`06a_results_load.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/06a_results_load.R), [`06b_dashboard_export.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/06b_dashboard_export.R) |

: Pipeline script organisation {#tbl-scripts}

## Replication for Other Areas

To replicate the IMPT for another Portuguese metropolitan area:

1. Replace the CAOP 2024 filter (NUTS-II codes `"Grande Lisboa"` and `"Península de Setúbal"`) with the target region.
2. Update the GTFS operator list in [`01_data_prep.R`](https://github.com/U-Shift/IMPT-data/blob/main/code/01_data_prep.R).
3. Obtain the IMOB travel survey OD matrix for the target area, and apply the dicofre conversion if needed.
4. Set up a HOT Export Tool bounding box for the new area.
5. Download the relevant Copernicus DEM tile.
6. Run scripts in order (00 → 06).

The H3 grid generation, routing engine, and scoring methodology are entirely generic and require no structural changes.
